detailed_description: This video provides a close-up view of a severe scalp condition, likely psoriasis or extreme dandruff, characterized by numerous large, yellowish, flaky scales embedded within the hair. A person wearing light blue medical gloves is seen carefully manipulating the hair and gently picking at these scales, highlighting the texture and extent of the build-up. The footage clearly illustrates the challenging nature of managing such a condition, emphasizing the physical manifestation of the scalp issue.

segments.why_kept: This segment is kept entirely as it fully captures the core meaning of the video: a detailed visual demonstration of a severe scalp condition and the professional interaction (process/labor) involved in managing or examining it. The action is continuous and begins immediately, concluding with the end of the clip, thus adhering to the 'No-Mistake' rule.
